form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming ran last of 12 at Greyville All Weather on February 23 over 1600m, 7 len behind World Of Our Own with 57kg at $26. Second-up second last of 10 at Greyville on March 22 over 2000m, 16 len behind Continentalexpress with 54kg at $67. Will need plenty of improvement to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after entering the straight, rolled out to continue its run.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 3rd of 13 at Greyville on March 22 over 1400m, 1.4 len behind Magma Magic carrying 57kg at $6. The race before that 4th of 11 at this track on March 15 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind Master Bomber with 57kg at $17. Not far off the winner latest and looks a genuine hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Brushed by O Space O shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 45-day let-up. First-up after two months 3rd of 14 at Kenilworth on February 22 over 1200m, 2.25 len behind Spirit with 58kg at $9. Previously second-up 5th of 11 at Kenilworth on November 15 over 1950m, 4.5 len behind Coco's Hero carrying 54.5kg at $1.90. Sure to run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Rolled in at the 1400m, carrying in Run For Cover.
Lost 1 length. At the 900m, rolled out.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Comes off a 49 day let-up. At the latest run won by a head at this track February 18 over 1600m defeating Pressure Point carrying 58.7kg at $5.50. The start before that 2nd of 9 at Greyville on January 18 over 1600m, 1.1 len behind Deepest Water with 57.5kg at $8. Broke maiden status last time and is worthy of consideration.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: In the concluding stages, shifted out away from the crop.
Over-raced in the early stages and thereafter hung in in the concluding stages.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign 11th of 14 at this track January 25 over 1750m, 5.5 len behind Tee Dog carrying 54.5kg at $15. Previously first up; sixth of 12 at Greyville December 26 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind Slytherin carrying 62.5kg at $21. Hard to enthuse.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation eighth of 12 at Greyville December 26 over 1600m, 3 len behind Slytherin carrying 62.5kg at $9. When resuming last campaign fifth of 7 at Greyville September 25 2024 over 1600m, 2.75 len behind Forgiveness carrying 51kg at $26. Faces a tough essay.
